title: Documented Phase 5 Closeout And Development Checklist
summary: Added a detailed development checklist for Local Studio route migration conventions and updated Phase 5 status to distinguish completed operational route migration from the remaining UI Catalogue demo visibility task.
effect: Future route-family work now has a focused checklist for public-link resolver adoption, Studio route URL builder use, Local Studio route migration, and UI Catalogue demo visibility. The Local Studio plan now treats UI Catalogue demos as first-class non-mutating Studio reference surfaces that still need Local Studio visibility.
